---
title: "nba_challenges"
output: html_document
date: "2024-09-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(arrow)
```

```{r}
# Load the data from the RDS file
load("data/nbaWinProb.RData")
# Creating a dataframe from the large list
df <- bind_rows(plst)
```

```{r}
# Removing duplicates (all around the end of quarter/start of quarter)

df <- df |> distinct(gt, m, line, .keep_all = TRUE) #keeps last duplicate (start of next quarter)
```

```{r}
# Interpolate to full grid of (line, m) for each gt that exists
full_m <- -20:20
full_line <- -15:15

# Helper: interpolate missing values for a vector
interpolate_vec <- function(x) {
  # x: numeric vector with NAs
  na_idx <- which(is.na(x))
  for (i in na_idx) {
    # Find nearest non-NA before and after
    before_idx <- which(!is.na(x[1:(i-1)]))
    after_idx <- which(!is.na(x[(i+1):length(x)]))
    
    left <- if (length(before_idx) > 0) max(before_idx) else NA
    right <- if (length(after_idx) > 0) min(after_idx) + i else NA
    
    if (!is.na(left) && !is.na(right)) {
      # Weighted average based on distance
      dist_left <- i - left
      dist_right <- right - i
      x[i] <- (x[left] * dist_right + x[right] * dist_left) / (dist_left + dist_right)
    } else if (!is.na(left)) {
      x[i] <- x[left]
    } else if (!is.na(right)) {
      x[i] <- x[right]
    }
  }
  return(x)
}

# Base columns to interpolate
data_cols <- c("H_P", "A_P", "H_M1", "A_FT1", "H_M2", "A_FT2", "A_FT3")

# Create full grid: (gt from data, line -15:15, m -20:20)
full_grid <- expand.grid(line = full_line, m = full_m, gt = unique(df$gt))
df <- left_join(full_grid, df, by = c("gt", "line", "m"))

# Interpolate across m within each (gt, line)
for (gt_val in unique(df$gt)) {
  for (line_val in full_line) {
    idx <- (df$gt == gt_val) & (df$line == line_val)
    for (col in data_cols) {
      if (col %in% names(df)) {
        df[[col]][idx] <- interpolate_vec(df[[col]][idx])
      }
    }
  }
}

# Interpolate across line within each (gt, m)
for (gt_val in unique(df$gt)) {
  for (m_val in full_m) {
    idx <- (df$gt == gt_val) & (df$m == m_val)
    for (col in data_cols) {
      if (col %in% names(df)) {
        df[[col]][idx] <- interpolate_vec(df[[col]][idx])
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# ADDING COLUMN FOR 2 POINT LAG
df_enhanced <- df |>
  left_join(
    df |> 
    select(gt, line, m, H_P) |>
    mutate(m = m + 2),
    by = c("gt", "line", "m"), suffix = c("", "_m2")) |>  # 2 point lag through data filtering
  left_join(
    df |> select(gt, line, m, H_M1) |> mutate(m = m + 1),  # 2 point lag, but using the pre-populated 1 point lag
    by = c("gt", "line", "m"),
    suffix = c("", "_m1")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    H_M2 = coalesce(H_P_m2, H_M1_m1)  # Fill in with m+2, if missing, use m+1
  ) |>
  select(-H_P_m2, -H_M1_m1)  # Drop the temporary columns

# ADDING COLUMN FOR 2 point lag on A_FT1
df_enhanced <- df_enhanced |>
  left_join(
    df |> select(gt, line, m, A_FT1) |> mutate(m = m + 2),
    by = c("gt", "line", "m"), suffix = c("", "_m2")) |>  # 2 point lag through data filtering
  left_join(
    df |> select(gt, line, m, A_FT1_M1) |> mutate(m = m + 1),  # 2 point lag, but using the pre-populated 1 point lag
    by = c("gt", "line", "m"),
    suffix = c("", "_m1")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    A_FT1_M2 = coalesce(A_FT1_m2, A_FT1_M1_m1)  # Fill in with m+2, if missing, use m+1
  ) |>
  select(-A_FT1_m2, -A_FT1_M1_m1)  # Drop the temporary columns
```

```{r}

# Add columns for each type of challenge

df_enhanced <- df_enhanced |>
  mutate(
    oob_challenge = H_P - A_P,
    nofoul2_keepBall = H_P - A_FT2,
    nofoul2_jumpBall = (H_P + A_P) / 2 - A_FT2,
    nofoul2_loseBall = A_P - A_FT2,
    nofoul3_keepBall = H_P - A_FT3,
    nofoul3_jumpBall = (H_P + A_P) / 2 - A_FT3,
    nofoul3_loseBall = A_P - A_FT3,
    nogoaltend = (H_P + A_P) / 2 - H_M2,
    noand1 = H_P - A_FT1_M2,
  )
```


```{r}
# Export WPA challenge values to Parquet for efficient downstream access

wpa_df <- df_enhanced |>
  select(gt, line, m, oob_challenge, nofoul2_keepBall, nofoul2_jumpBall, nofoul2_loseBall, nofoul3_keepBall, nofoul3_jumpBall, nofoul3_loseBall, nogoaltend, noand1)

# Write to Parquet
arrow::write_parquet(wpa_df, "data/wpa_challenge_values.parquet")
```

```{r}
# Check what's actually in the parquet
wpa_parquet <- arrow::read_parquet("data/wpa_challenge_values.parquet")
print(nrow(wpa_parquet))  # how many rows?

# Check if your row exists
test_row <- wpa_parquet %>% 
  filter(line == 2, gt == 2625, m == 14)
print(nrow(test_row))  # should be 1, if it's 0, parquet is stale

# Check what's in df_enhanced
test_row_df <- df_enhanced %>% 
  filter(line == 2, gt == 2625, m == 14)
print(nrow(test_row_df))  # should be 1
```

```{r}
df_oob_same_odds <- df_enhanced |>
  filter(line == 0) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = gt,
    values_from = oob_challenge,
    id_cols = m,
  )
```

```{r}
df_oob_same_score <- df_enhanced |>
  filter(m == 0) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = gt,
    values_from = oob_challenge,
    id_cols = line,
  )
```

```{r}
df_enhanced |>
  filter(line == 0) |>
  filter(m %in% c(-17, -15, -13, -3, -2, -1, 0)) |>
  select(gt, oob_challenge, m) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = gt, y = oob_challenge, color = factor(m))) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Out Of Bounds Challenge",
       x = "Time (720 seconds = 1 quarter)",
       y = "Win % Added Due to Successful Challenge",
       color = "Score Difference") +
  expand_limits(y = 0) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 2880, by = 360), # Set labels every 360 seconds
  ) +
  scale_color_colorblind() +
  theme_minimal()

# df_enhanced |>
#   filter(m == 0) |>
#   filter(line %in% c(-20, -15, -10, -5, 0)) |>
#   select(gt, oob_challenge, line) |>
#   ggplot(aes(x = gt, y = oob_challenge, color = factor(line))) +
#   geom_line() +
#   labs(title = "Out Of Bounds Challenge",
#        x = "Time (720 seconds = 1 quarter)",
#        y = "Win % Added Due to Successful Challenge",
#        color = "Betting Line") +
#   expand_limits(y = 0) +
#   scale_x_continuous(
#     breaks = seq(0, 2880, by = 360), # Set labels every 360 seconds
#   ) +
#   scale_color_colorblind() +
#   theme_minimal()

# ggplot(df_enhanced |> filter(line == 0, m == 0), aes(x = gt)) +
#   geom_line(aes(y = oob_challenge, color = "oob_challenge")) +
#   geom_line(aes(y = nofoul2_keepBall, color = "nofoul2_keepBall")) +
#   geom_line(aes(y = nofoul2_jumpBall, color = "nofoul2_jumpBall")) +
#   geom_line(aes(y = nofoul2_loseBall, color = "nofoul2_loseBall")) +
#   geom_line(aes(y = nofoul3_keepBall, color = "nofoul3_keepBall")) +
#   #geom_line(aes(y = nofoul3_jumpBall, color = "nofoul3_jumpBall")) +
#   #geom_line(aes(y = nofoul3_loseBall, color = "nofoul3_loseBall")) +
#   geom_line(aes(y = nogoaltend, color = "nogoaltend")) +
#   geom_line(aes(y = noand1, color = "noand1")) +
#   expand_limits(y = 0) +
#   scale_x_continuous(
#     breaks = seq(0, 2880, by = 360), # Set labels every 360 seconds
#   ) +
#   scale_color_colorblind(
#     labels = c("oob_challenge" = "Out of Bounds",
#                "nofoul2_keepBall" = "Foul and Recover Ball",
#                "nofoul2_jumpBall" = "Foul but Jump Ball",
#                "nofoul2_loseBall" = "Foul but Opponent Ball",
#                "nofoul3_keepBall" = "3 pt foul, Recover Ball",
#                "nofoul3_jumpBall" = "3 pt foul, Jump Ball",
#                "nofoul3_loseBall" = "3 pt foul, Opponent Ball",
#                "noand1" = "And-1 foul overturned",
#                "nogoaltend" = "Goaltend call overturned")
#   ) +
#   labs(title = "Tie Game",
#        x = "Time (720 seconds = 1 quarter)",
#        y = "Win % Added Due to Successful Challenge",
#        color = "Challenge Type") +
#   theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
#divide nofoul3_jumpball/nofoul2_jumpball and show distribution

quotients <- na.omit(df_enhanced$nofoul3_jumpBall  / df_enhanced$nofoul2_jumpBall)
quotients <- quotients[is.finite(quotients)]

summary(quotients)
plot(density(quotients), xlim = c(0, 4))
```


```{r}
# for writing a data.frame or list of data.frames to an xlsx file
#write.xlsx(df_oob_same_odds, file='sample_data.xlsx', sheetName='oob_challenge_full_grid')
#write.xlsx(df_oob_same_score, file='sample_data.xlsx', sheetName='oob_challenge_same_score', append=TRUE)

list_of_datasets <- list("oob_challenge_same_odds" = df_oob_same_odds, "oob_challenge_same_score" = df_oob_same_score)
write.xlsx(list_of_datasets, file = "sample_data.xlsx")
```
